controls.title: Deep Check via Random Sampling
controls.description: A full decode scan can take hours per large file. Set a per-file time budget so Curatarr samples random timeline segments and flags obvious playback-impacting issues.
controls.budgetHint: 30 to 3600 seconds. Re-runs may find additional issues by sampling different areas.
controls.alreadyRunning: A verify run is already in progress.
controls.alreadyRunningAlert: Deep Check is already running in another tab/window. Wait for completion or stop the current run first.

live.waiting: Waiting for workers to start files…
live.title: Live Results (last {{count}})

failures.title: Verification Failures
failures.recheckTitle: Run deep check again for this file
failures.recheckDisabledTitle: Recheck is disabled while a verify run is in progress
